# services.maubot

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.maubot`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.maubot.configMutable` | `boolean` | Whether maubot should write updated config into `extraConfigFile`. **This will make your Nix module settings have no effect besides the initial config, as extraConfigFile takes precedence over NixOS settings!** |
| `services.maubot.dataDir` | `string` | The directory where maubot stores its stateful data. |
| `services.maubot.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable maubot. |
| `services.maubot.extraConfigFile` | `string` | A file for storing secrets. You can pass homeserver registration keys here. If it already exists, **it must contain `server.unshared_secret`** which is used for signing API keys. If `configMutable` is not set to true, **maubot user must have write access to this file**. |
| `services.maubot.package` | `package` | The maubot package to use. |
| `services.maubot.plugins` | `list of package` | List of additional maubot plugins to make available. |
| `services.maubot.pythonPackages` | `list of package` | List of additional Python packages to make available for maubot. |
| `services.maubot.settings` | `submodule` | YAML settings for maubot. See the [example configuration](https://github.com/maubot/maubot/blob/master/maubot/example-config.yaml) for more info. Secrets should be passed in by using `extraConfigFile`. |
| `services.maubot.settings.admins` | `attribute set of string` | List of administrator users. Plaintext passwords will be bcrypted on startup. Set empty password to prevent normal login. Root is a special user that can't have a password and will always exist. |
| `services.maubot.settings.api_features` | `attribute set of boolean` | API feature switches. |
| `services.maubot.settings.crypto_database` | `string` | Separate database URL for the crypto database. By default, the regular database is also used for crypto. |
| `services.maubot.settings.database` | `string` | The full URI to the database. SQLite and Postgres are fully supported. Other DBMSes supported by SQLAlchemy may or may not work. |
| `services.maubot.settings.database_opts` | `attribute set` | Additional arguments for asyncpg.create_pool() or sqlite3.connect() |
| `services.maubot.settings.homeservers` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | Known homeservers. This is required for the `mbc auth` command and also allows more convenient access from the management UI. If you want to specify registration secrets, pass this via extraConfigFile instead. |
| `services.maubot.settings.homeservers.<name>.url` | `string` | Client-server API URL |
| `services.maubot.settings.logging` | `attribute set` | Python logging configuration. See [section 16.7.2 of the Python documentation](https://docs.python.org/3.6/library/logging.config.html#configuration-dictionary-schema) for more info. |
| `services.maubot.settings.plugin_databases` | `submodule` | Plugin database settings |
| `services.maubot.settings.plugin_databases.postgres` | `null or string` | The connection URL for plugin database. See [example config](https://github.com/maubot/maubot/blob/master/maubot/example-config.yaml) for exact format. |
| `services.maubot.settings.plugin_databases.postgres_max_conns_per_plugin` | `null or signed integer` | Maximum number of connections per plugin instance. |
| `services.maubot.settings.plugin_databases.postgres_opts` | `attribute set` | Overrides for the default database_opts when using a non-default postgres connection URL. |
| `services.maubot.settings.plugin_databases.sqlite` | `string` | The directory where SQLite plugin databases should be stored. |
| `services.maubot.settings.plugin_directories` | `submodule` | Plugin directory paths |
| `services.maubot.settings.plugin_directories.load` | `list of string` | The directories from which plugins should be loaded. Duplicate plugin IDs will be moved to the trash. |
| `services.maubot.settings.plugin_directories.trash` | `null or string` | The directory where old plugin versions and conflicting plugins should be moved. Set to null to delete files immediately. |
| `services.maubot.settings.plugin_directories.upload` | `string` | The directory where uploaded new plugins should be stored. |
| `services.maubot.settings.server` | `submodule` | Listener config |
| `services.maubot.settings.server.hostname` | `string` | The IP to listen on |
| `services.maubot.settings.server.override_resource_path` | `null or string` | Override path from where to load UI resources. |
| `services.maubot.settings.server.plugin_base_path` | `string` | The base path for plugin endpoints. The instance ID will be appended directly. |
| `services.maubot.settings.server.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The port to listen on |
| `services.maubot.settings.server.public_url` | `string` | Public base URL where the server is visible. |
| `services.maubot.settings.server.ui_base_path` | `string` | The base path for the UI. |
